case_title: KARADSHE & SONS, INC. VS. YEKTA MARKET & DELI

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YEKTA MARKET & DELI HEARING SET FOR OCT-05-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARADSHE & SONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEKTA MARKET & DELI $304.68 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $394.68, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
